name: FIH group plc
summary: FIH group plc, through its subsidiaries, engages in retailing, property, insurance, hotels, shipping, and fishing agency businesses in the Falkland Islands and the United Kingdom. The company retails food, clothing, electrical goods, home furnishings, gifts, and DIY products through 6 retail outlets; sells and hires 4x4 vehicles; and offers travel services, such as flight bookings, airport transfers, and luxury coach and walking tours for tourists. It also provides insurance brokerage services; agency services for cruise ships and fishing vessels; and freight and shipping services to and from the Islands. In addition, the company constructs residential and commercial properties with a portfolio of 40 residential, office, and industrial accommodation properties; offers passenger ferry services across the mouth of Portsmouth harbor through 3 vessels; and operates a cruising vessel providing leisure cruises around the Solent in summer. Further, it is involved in the handling, logistics, storage, and installation of fine art and antiquities. The company was formerly known as Falkland Islands Holdings plc and changed its name to FIH group plc in September 2016. FIH Group plc was founded in 1851 and is headquartered in Bishop's Stortford, the United Kingdom.
